description: One of the earliest crime families in New York City, based in Manhattan's Little Italy. Founded by Salvatore D'Aquila in the 1910s after breaking off from the Morello family and absorbing remnants of the Brooklyn Camorra. Active in racketeering, extortion, and murder until D'Aquila's murder in 1928, after which the family was taken over by Manfredi Mineo and eventually became part of the modern Gambino crime family.
